basic_01_inventory_cash.reason: Actual: Inventory(debit,$88.50), HST Receivable(debit,$11.50), Cash(credit,$100). Expected: Inventories(debit,$100), Cash(credit,$100). Actual assumes $100 is tax-inclusive and splits out HST. Expected treats $100 as the inventory cost with no tax. tax_relaxed_match = true because assuming tax-inclusive pricing and recovering HST is a realistic treatment for a Canadian corporation.

basic_02_inventory_on_account.reason: Actual: Inventory(debit,$300), HST Receivable(debit,$39), AP(credit,$339). Expected: Inventories(debit,$300), Trade payables(credit,$300). Actual adds HST on top of the $300 stated amount. tax_relaxed_match = true because adding recoverable HST to a purchase on account is realistic.

basic_03_issue_stock_with_apic.reason: Cash(debit,$180), Common Stock(credit,$100), Additional Paid-in Capital(credit,$80) match expected exactly. Share capital - Common synonym.

basic_04_sell_inventory.reason: Actual: Cash(debit,$565), COGS(debit,$300), Sales Revenue(credit,$500), Inventory(credit,$300), HST Payable(credit,$65). Expected: Cash(debit,$500), COGS(debit,$300), Revenue(credit,$500), Inventory(credit,$300). Actual adds HST of $65 on the sale, increasing Cash to $565 and adding HST Payable. tax_relaxed_match = true because collecting HST on inventory sales is mandatory in Canada.

basic_05_pay_accounts_payable.reason: Accounts Payable(debit,$50), Cash(credit,$50) match expected. Trade payables synonym.

basic_06_refinance_loan.reason: Loan Payable - Old(debit,$100), Loan Payable - New(credit,$100) match expected. Notes payable synonym.

basic_07_loan_to_equity.reason: Actual returned INCOMPLETE_INFORMATION with empty lines. Expected: Notes payable(debit,$200), Share capital - Common(credit,$200). INCOMPLETE_INFORMATION with no entry does not match when expected has a valid entry.

basic_08_deliver_service_against_deposit.reason: Customer Deposits(debit,$100), Service Revenue(credit,$100) match expected. Contract liabilities synonym.

basic_09_repurchase_stock.reason: Treasury Stock(debit,$200), Cash(credit,$200) match expected. Treasury shares synonym.

basic_10_declare_dividend.reason: Retained Earnings(debit,$500,000), Dividends Payable(credit,$500,000) match expected exactly.

basic_12_pay_salaries.reason: Salaries Expense(debit,$100), Cash(credit,$100) match expected exactly.

basic_13_accrue_utility.reason: Actual: Utilities Expense(debit,$50), HST Receivable(debit,$6.50), AP(credit,$56.50). Expected: Utilities expense(debit,$50), Accrued liabilities(credit,$50). Actual adds HST recovery. tax_relaxed_match = true because recovering HST on utilities is realistic for a Canadian corporation.

basic_14_casualty_loss.reason: Loss on Inventory - Natural Disaster(debit,$2,000), Inventory(credit,$2,000) match expected. Casualty loss synonym.

basic_15_no_entry.reason: Both expected and actual have no entry lines. Both null -> match.

int_03_machinery_purchase.reason: Machinery(debit,$800,000), AP(credit,$700,000), Cash(credit,$100,000) match expected. PP&E - Machinery synonym. All amounts correct.

int_04_major_overhaul.reason: Actual: Machinery(debit,$200,000), HST Receivable(debit,$26,000), Cash(credit,$226,000). Expected: PP&E - Machinery(debit,$200,000), Cash(credit,$200,000). Actual adds HST on the overhaul cost. tax_relaxed_match = true because HST on capital expenditure services is recoverable in Canada.

int_05_bond_issuance_discount.reason: Cash(debit,$2,657,529), Bond Discount(debit,$342,471), Bonds Payable(credit,$3,000,000) match expected structure. Expected Cash=$2,657,510, Discount=$342,490. Difference of $19 is <1% of the discount amount ($342,490), within PV rounding tolerance.

int_09_merchandise_with_costs.reason: Inventory(debit,$1,150,000), Warehouse Storage Expense(debit,$20,000), Freight Out Expense(debit,$50,000), AP(credit,$1,000,000), Cash credits ($120k+$30k+$20k+$50k) sum to $220,000. Consolidation: 4 Cash credit lines sum to $220,000 matching expected. Distribution costs synonym for Freight Out; Warehousing expense synonym for Warehouse Storage.

int_10_prepayment.reason: Prepaid Expenses(debit,$1,000,000), Cash(credit,$1,000,000) match expected. Prepayments synonym.

int_11_land_instalment_discount.reason: Actual: Land(debit,$49,173,000), Note Payable(credit,$49,173,000). Expected: Land(debit,$49,173,000), Discount on long-term payables(debit,$10,827,000), Long-term payables(credit,$60,000,000). Actual uses net method (liability at PV) rather than gross method with explicit discount contra-liability. Missing the discount account entirely. Different structural approach.

int_12_site_improvements.reason: Land Improvements(debit,$1,750,000), Land(debit,$2,360,000), Cash(credit,$4,110,000) match expected. PP&E - Site improvements synonym for Land Improvements. Expected has two Cash credit lines ($1,750,000 + $2,360,000) that sum to $4,110,000 matching actual's consolidated Cash line. Line consolidation rule applies.

int_13_donation_note.reason: Charitable Donations Expense(debit,$1,000,000), Notes Payable(credit,$1,000,000) match expected. Donations expense synonym.

int_14_vehicle_mixed_payment.reason: Actual: Vehicles(debit,$40,000), HST Receivable(debit,$5,200), Cash(credit,$22,600), Notes Payable(credit,$22,600). Expected: PP&E - Vehicles(debit,$40,000), Cash(credit,$20,000), Notes Payable(credit,$20,000). Actual adds HST of $5,200 and distributes the tax across both payment methods. tax_relaxed_match = true because adding HST on vehicle purchases is realistic in Canada.

int_15_bank_loan.reason: Cash(debit,$200,000), Bank Loan Payable(credit,$200,000) match expected. Long-term borrowings synonym.

int_17_customer_deposit.reason: Cash(debit,$5,000), Unearned Revenue(credit,$5,000) match expected. Contract liabilities synonym. Cash - chequing synonym.

int_18_multiple_assets.reason: Actual: Office Furniture($2,000), Computer Equipment($3,500), Vehicles($250,000), HST Receivable($33,215), Cash(credit,$6,215), AP(credit,$282,500). Expected: PP&E - Office equipment(debit,$5,500), PP&E - Vehicles(debit,$250,000), Cash(credit,$5,500), AP(credit,$250,000). Multiple issues: (1) actual splits office equipment into two lines vs expected one, (2) actual adds HST, (3) amounts differ due to tax. Even under tax_relaxed_match the split of office equipment into furniture + computers is a classification difference, not tax.

int_19_service_revenue_cash.reason: Actual: Cash(debit,$28,815), Revenue(credit,$25,500), HST Payable(credit,$3,315). Expected: Cash(debit,$25,500), Revenue(credit,$25,500). Actual adds HST collected on the service. tax_relaxed_match = true because collecting HST on taxable services is required in Canada.

int_20_service_revenue_credit.reason: Actual: AR(debit,$35,595), Revenue(credit,$31,500), HST Payable(credit,$4,095). Expected: Trade receivables(debit,$31,500), Revenue(credit,$31,500). int_22_compound_sale_with_tax.reason: Cash(debit,$45,900), AR(debit,$30,000), COGS(debit,$55,500), Sales Revenue(credit,$69,000), Sales Tax Payable(credit,$6,900), Inventory(credit,$55,500) match expected exactly.

int_23_split_electricity.reason: Actual: Utilities Expense - Factory(debit,$15,000), Utilities Expense - Office(debit,$5,500), HST Receivable(debit,$2,665), Credit Card Payable(credit,$23,165). Expected: Work in process - Manufacturing overhead(debit,$15,000), Utilities expense(debit,$5,500), Credit card payable(credit,$20,500). Factory electricity should be WIP asset, not expense. Also adds HST. Even under tax relaxation, the factory account classification (expense vs WIP) is wrong.

int_24_advertising.reason: Actual: Marketing Expense(debit,$19,469.03), HST Receivable(debit,$2,530.97), Cash(credit,$22,000). Expected: Advertising expense(debit,$22,000), Cash(credit,$22,000). Actual correctly treats the $22,000 as tax-inclusive and splits out recoverable HST. tax_relaxed_match = true.

int_25_building_purchase_allocation.reason: Land(debit,$6,000,000), Building(debit,$3,000,000), HST Receivable(debit,$300,000), AP(credit,$4,500,000), Cash(credit,$4,800,000) match expected. VAT receivable synonym for HST Receivable. Other payables synonym for AP.

int_26a_payroll_recognition.reason: Actual: WIP Inventory(debit,$25,000), Salaries Expense(debit,$20,000), 4 separate payable credit lines summing to $7,750, Cash(credit,$37,250). Expected: WIP - Direct labour(debit,$25,000), Salaries expense(debit,$20,000), Statutory withholdings payable(credit,$7,750), Cash - chequing(credit,$37,250). Actual splits the $7,750 withholdings into 4 accounts (Pension $2k, Health $3.25k, EI $1.05k, IT $1.45k) while expected consolidates into one Statutory withholdings payable. The 4 payable lines all go to different named accounts, so line consolidation rule does not apply (consolidation requires same account). However, the debit amounts and Cash credit match. This is a presentation difference where actual uses more granular liability accounts. Marking as false for strict match.

int_26b_payroll_remittance.reason: Actual: 4 liability debits (Pension $4k, Health $6.5k, EI $2.1k, IT $1.45k = $14,050 total), Cash(credit,$14,050). Expected: Statutory withholdings payable(debit,$7,750), Employee benefits expense(debit,$6,300), Cash(credit,$14,050). Actual treats all $14,050 as liability decreases. Expected splits into employee portion ($7,750 liability decrease) and employer matching ($6,300 expense). Actual misses the employer benefits expense entirely.

int_hard_27a_meal_overtime.reason: Actual: Employee Benefits Expense(debit,$117.81), HST Receivable(debit,$7.19), Credit Card Payable(credit,$125). Expected: Employee benefits expense(debit,$125), Credit card payable(credit,$125). Actual splits out partial HST recovery (50% meal ITC rule). tax_relaxed_match = true because applying the 50% meal ITC restriction is a realistic Canadian tax treatment.

Expected: Meeting expense(debit,$125), Credit card payable(credit,$125). Actual splits out partial HST recovery. Meeting expense synonym for Meals and Entertainment. tax_relaxed_match = true.

int_hard_27c_meal_entertainment.reason: Meals and Entertainment Expense(debit,$125), Credit Card Payable(credit,$125) match expected. Entertainment expense synonym.

int_hard_27d_meal_factory.reason: Actual: Manufacturing Overhead(debit,$133.12), HST Receivable(debit,$8.13), Credit Card Payable(credit,$141.25). int_hard_32a_grocery_entertainment.reason: Entertainment Expense(debit,$1,320), Credit Card Payable(credit,$1,320) match expected. The expected amount is $1,320 (full tax-inclusive amount). The actual correctly does not split out tax since entertainment expenses have 0% ITC recovery.

int_hard_32b_grocery_breakroom.reason: Actual: Office Supplies Expense(debit,$1,200), HST Receivable(debit,$120), Credit Card Payable(credit,$1,320). Expected: Employee benefits expense(debit,$1,320), Credit card payable(credit,$1,320).
